operation.name: InsertIgnore
operation.sql: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_pts_state (user_id, pts, pts_updated_at, partition_id, owner_epoch, row_version) VALUES (:user_id, :pts, :pts_updated_at, :partition_id, :owner_epoch, :row_version)

operation.name: SelectByUserId
operation.sql: SELECT user_id, pts, pts_updated_at, partition_id, owner_epoch, row_version FROM user_pts_state WHERE user_id = :user_id LIMIT 1

operation.name: SelectForUpdate
operation.sql: SELECT user_id, pts, pts_updated_at, partition_id, owner_epoch, row_version FROM user_pts_state WHERE user_id = :user_id LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

operation.name: UpdatePts
operation.sql: UPDATE user_pts_state SET pts = :pts, pts_updated_at = :pts_updated_at, partition_id = :partition_id, owner_epoch = :owner_epoch, row_version = row_version + 1 WHERE user_id = :user_id
